---
title: "Synthetic RWE HPV Vaccine-Effectiveness Study"
subtitle: "Cohort attrition · survival · vaccine effectiveness · registry QC catch"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-align: center
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
# Renders the pipeline outputs in results/ (produced by R/01-05). Paths are
# relative to this file (dashboard/), so results/ is one level up.
res <- function(...) file.path("..", "results", ...)
read_res <- function(f) if (file.exists(res(f))) utils::read.csv(res(f)) else NULL
library(knitr)
```

::: {.callout-warning}
## Synthetic data — methods demonstration only
Every figure on this page was computed on **fully synthetic** claims generated
by this repository, with a "true" effect deliberately built into the data
generator. **Nothing here is a real HPV vaccine-effectiveness estimate.** The
purpose is to demonstrate the analysis and the data-quality control end to end,
and to show that the pipeline recovers the planted ground truth.
:::

## Cohort attrition

How the source population narrows to the analytic cohort through each
pre-specified inclusion/exclusion criterion (CONSORT-style).

```{r attrition}
attr <- read_res("attrition_table.csv")
if (!is.null(attr)) {
  kable(attr,
        col.names = c("Step", "Criterion", "Remaining", "Excluded", "% of source"),
        align = c("c", "l", "r", "r", "r"))
}
```

```{r attrition-note}
#| output: asis
if (!is.null(attr)) {
  cat(sprintf("**Final analytic cohort: %s members.**",
              format(tail(attr$n_remaining, 1), big.mark = ",")))
}
```

## Outcome ascertainment

Members, incident CIN2+/cervical-cancer events, and person-years by exposure
group.

```{r outcome}
out <- read_res("outcome_summary.csv")
if (!is.null(out)) kable(out, col.names = c("Exposure", "Members", "Events", "Person-years"))
```

## Survival analysis

Descriptive cumulative incidence by ever-vaccinated status. The primary
estimate comes from the time-varying Cox model below (the KM figure is
descriptive and subject to immortal-time caveats).

```{r km, fig.cap="Cumulative incidence of CIN2+/cervical cancer (synthetic data)."}
if (file.exists(res("km_curve.png"))) include_graphics(res("km_curve.png"))
```

#### Incidence rates (per 1,000 person-years)

```{r incidence}
inc <- read_res("incidence_rates.csv")
if (!is.null(inc)) {
  inc$person_years    <- round(inc$person_years, 0)
  inc$rate_per_1000py <- round(inc$rate_per_1000py, 2)
  kable(inc, col.names = c("Group", "Events", "Person-years", "Rate / 1,000 PY"))
}
```

#### Vaccine effectiveness `VE = (1 − HR) × 100%`

```{r ve}
ve <- read_res("ve_estimates.csv")
if (!is.null(ve)) {
  fmt <- data.frame(
    Model    = ve$model,
    Events   = ve$n_events,
    HR       = sprintf("%.2f", ve$hr),
    `HR 95% CI` = sprintf("%.2f to %.2f", ve$hr_lci, ve$hr_uci),
    `VE (%)`    = sprintf("%.1f", ve$ve_pct),
    `VE 95% CI` = sprintf("%.0f to %.0f%%", ve$ve_lci, ve$ve_uci),
    check.names = FALSE)
  kable(fmt, align = "lrrrrr")
}
```

```{r ve-headline}
#| output: asis
if (!is.null(ve)) {
  a <- ve[nrow(ve), ]
  cat(sprintf("**Adjusted VE = %.0f%% (95%% CI %.0f-%.0f%%)** -- recovering the generator's true VE of 55%%.",
              a$ve_pct, a$ve_lci, a$ve_uci))
}
```

## Data-quality finding (the catch)

Cross-source reconciliation independently re-discovered a **systematic
vaccine-classification anomaly** planted in one registry feed: Gardasil 9
(HPV9) doses recorded **before that product existed**, contradicted by the
members' claims-derived product.

```{r qc-headline}
#| output: asis
flagged <- read_res("qc_flagged_members.csv")
if (!is.null(flagged)) {
  src <- paste(sort(unique(flagged$source)), collapse = ", ")
  cat(sprintf("**%s registry records across %s patients flagged**, entirely within the `%s` feed.",
              format(nrow(flagged), big.mark = ","),
              format(length(unique(flagged$member_id)), big.mark = ","), src))
}
```

```{r dot, fig.cap="Registry doses over time by product. HPV9 doses before 2014 are impossible - the planted anomaly."}
if (file.exists(res("doses_over_time.png"))) include_graphics(res("doses_over_time.png"))
```

**Impact & handling.** The error misclassifies *product*, not dose presence, so
the all-product VE above is robust while product-specific estimates are not.
The full finding and the vendor-escalation plan are in
[`docs/results_summary.md`](../docs/results_summary.md).
